details: The agent ran multiple kubectl-axi commands against the cluster (triage, deploy view, pods view) and produced a complete, accurate diagnosis. It correctly identified: (1) the rollout is stuck with ProgressDeadlineExceeded, (2) the root cause is the non-existent image nginx:2.0-does-not-exist causing ImagePullBackOff on the v2 pod, and (3) the v1 pods (nginx:1.27-alpine) remain serving traffic because Kubernetes won't terminate old pods until new ones are healthy. All findings are directly supported by the command outputs.
